falsification_conditions.condition: Price increases by 15% above the current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average without a corresponding price increase
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a potential blowoff top (contradicting the blowoff score of 38) or market indecision, falsifying the current analysis of a HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price breaks below the 2022 May Luna support level (e.g., $0.12) by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below a key historical support level would invalidate the pattern similarity to the 2022 bottom, proving the current UNKNOWN verdict is incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
